title: macOS app: Sparkle-style auto-update
description: No update mechanism. Users have no way to know there is a newer SweechBar build.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Priority: "Proper SweechBar distribution (codesign + notarise + sparkle auto-update)"

acceptanceCriteria: Sparkle SPM dep added; appcast URL configurable in Info.plist
Checks for updates every 24h and on app launch
User can disable auto-update in a Settings sheet
No update prompts in unsigned dev builds
